text: Opinion: Humanity's hopes ascended with Artemis II
description: NPR's Scott Simon reflects on the successful launch of NASA's Artemis II this week. The four astronauts aboard will travel around the moon.

text: Buttercream wool and jelly bean eyes: The art of the Easter lamb cake
description: The cakes – usually baked in the shape of a lamb using a special pan – have a long history in Central Europe, from the German osterlamm, to the Polish baranek wielkanocny, to the Alsatian lammele.

text: Iran war enters its 6th week as military searches for downed jet crew member
description: The war in Iran enters its 6th week as the search continues for the missing U.S. service member who bailed out of a fighter jet shot down over Iran on Friday.
